verse.name: V1
verse.lines: I care not today What the morrow may bring, If shadow or sunshine or rain, The Lord I know ruleth o'er everything, And all of my worry is vain.

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: Living by faith, in Jesus above, Trusting, confiding in His great love; From all harm safe In His sheltering arm. I'm living by faith And I feel no alarm.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Though tempest may blow And the stormclouds arise, Obscuring the brightness of life, I'm never alarmed At the overcast skies, The Master looks on at the strife.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: I know that He safely will carry me through, No matter what evils betide, Why should I then care, Though the tempest may blow, If Jesus walks close to my side.

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: Our Lord will return to this earth some sweet day, Our troubles will then all be o'er. The Master so gently Will lead us away, Beyond that blest heavenly shore.
